principle.name: Follow existing component patterns
principle.description: All new components must follow the patterns established in the project's shadcn/ui components (cva variants, cn() class merging, data attributes).
principle.rationale: Consistency makes components predictable and maintainable

principle.name: Use design tokens, not raw values
principle.description: Always use CSS variable-based Tailwind classes (bg-primary, text-muted-foreground, border-border) instead of hardcoded colors or spacing values.
principle.rationale: Ensures theme consistency and dark mode support automatically

principle.name: Mobile-first responsive design
principle.description: Write base styles for mobile, then add responsive overrides with sm:, md:, lg:, xl:, 2xl: prefixes.
principle.rationale: Progressive enhancement is more reliable than desktop-first degradation

principle.name: Prefer composition over complexity
principle.description: Build complex UIs by composing simple, focused components rather than creating monolithic ones.
principle.rationale: Composable components are reusable, testable, and easier to understand

convention.rule: Use function declarations, not arrow functions, for components
Use React.ComponentProps utility for prop types
Add data-slot attribute to root element for styling hooks
Use cva() from class-variance-authority for variant management
Use cn() from @/lib/utils for conditional class merging
Import cva and VariantProps from class-variance-authority
Use semantic color tokens (primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive)
Use oklch-based CSS variables defined in globals.css
Apply dark: variant for any dark-mode-specific overrides
Use Tailwind's built-in spacing scale (p-4, gap-2, etc.)
Leverage focus-visible: for keyboard focus styles
Tool UI components go in components/tool-ui/
Page files go in app/ directory following Next.js App Router conventions
Each tool-ui component gets its own directory with index.ts barrel export

pitfall.description: Using hardcoded color values instead of design tokens
pitfall.why_problematic: Breaks theming and dark mode support
pitfall.correct_approach: Use Tailwind semantic classes like bg-primary, text-muted-foreground

pitfall.description: Not using cn() for conditional classes
pitfall.why_problematic: Causes class conflicts that tailwind-merge can't resolve
pitfall.correct_approach: Always wrap conditional classes with cn()

pitfall.description: Ignoring dark mode in new styles
pitfall.why_problematic: Components look broken in dark mode
pitfall.correct_approach: Test dark mode variants; use CSS variable-based tokens which handle both modes

pitfall.description: Creating one-off styles instead of reusable components
pitfall.why_problematic: Leads to style duplication and inconsistency
pitfall.correct_approach: Extract repeated patterns into shared components with variants

category.name: before_starting
category.item: Review existing components in the target area for patterns
Check globals.css for available design tokens
Identify reusable components that can be composed

category.name: during_implementation
category.item: Use cn() for all conditional class merging
Apply design tokens, not hardcoded values
Add data-slot attributes to root elements

category.name: before_completion
category.item: Ensure no visual regressions in existing components
Validate that imports are correct and minimal
